hero_description: Amity Online MBA in Data Science
meta_description: Amity Online MBA in Data Science
about_content:
MBA in Data Science by Amity Online is a full-fledged online learning program delivered through a 100% online learning platform. The main objective of the MBA in data science at Amity University Online is to assist students in developing their skills to transform data into business insights. Amity University Online offers various tools along with the course to guide students in becoming professionals in the data science industry.

The MBA in Data Science by Amity Online is ranked by QS in India with expertise in the development of leadership skills essential for the 21st century. The program is ideal for students and working professionals with its remote/virtual learning facility. As per the latest reports, the data science industry has increased by 46% in employability, making an online MBA in data science at Amity University Online a perfect postgraduation degree for every student willing to acquire an MBA qualification.
placement_stat_1: As per the latest reports, the data science industry has increased by 46% in employability, making an online MBA in data science at Amity University Online a perfect postgraduation degree for every student willing to acquire an MBA qualification.

highlights.item: A 24 month interest-free easy EMI facility is offered under the Amity online MBA program as financial aid.
Amity University Online is among the top B schools in India and all of its abroad and Indian campuses are interconnected through a highly secure pirate network of their own.
Students enrolled in the Amity Online MBA can access the last-minute revision classes offered at all Amity University campuses.
The Amity University online MBA placement assistance conducts online placement drives every fortnight.
Amity University Online is among the most renowned private universities and its vast network of notable alumni includes  Kunal Khemu, Disha Patani, Himansh Kohli, Urfi Javed, etc.

eligibility_content:
Students willing to enroll in the Amity Online MBA are required to fulfill the eligibility criteria of the program along with the admission requirements mentioned below:

  • The applicant must have completed a 10+2 formal educational qualification from a recognized board of education.
  • Along with the 12 years of formal education, a bachelor’s degree in any domain is required from a valid and recognized university.
  • The applicant must be familiar with and have an intermediate understanding of the English language.

admission_steps:
Working professionals or students who are willing to pursue an online MBA program must follow the below-listed steps involved in the Amity online admission process:

Step 1. Select the online MBA program along with the best-suited specialization as per your career goals.

Step 2. Complete the application form on Amity University Online's official website by providing personal information.

Step 3. Pay the program fee using your chosen payment mode and fee plan.

Step 4. Once the application form is completely filled, submit it and complete the registration process.

Step 5. Once the admission is confirmed, Amity Online will share the enrollment details.
syllabus_content:
The MBA in data science subjects​ at Amity University Online is industry-specific and offers dedicated career goals to students. The Amity Online MBA in Data Science syllabus enhances business intelligence, machine learning, database management, and other relevant skills among the students.

A detailed Amity Online MBA in Data Science syllabus is listed below for a better course overview:

Amity Online MBA in Data Science Syllabus

Year I

Semester I

Semester II

  • Managerial Economics
  • Statistics for Management
  • Professional communication
  • Accounting for Managers
  • Marketing Management
  • Legal Aspects of Business
  • Business Research Methods
  • Financial Management
  • Human Resource Management
  • Conflict Resolution and Management

Year II

Semester III

Semester IV

  • Analytics for decision-making
  • Data Engineering
  • Data Visualization and EDA
  • Introduction to Data Science
  • Minor Project
  • Professional Ethics
  • Strategic Management
  • Advance Deep Learning
  • Digital Marketing
  • Major Project
  • Management in Action - Social Economic and Ethical Issues
  • Supervised and Unsupervised Machine Learning
exam_content:
The Amity Online MBA in Data Science follows the exact similar examination pattern to other specializations offered under an online MBA. The examination pattern includes internal assessments that carry 30% weightage of the total marks, whereas the term-end examinations carry 70% of the overall marks.

Both components are designed to evaluate the overall theoretical knowledge and practical experience acquired by students during their academic journey at Amity University Online.
placement_content:
To offer better career opportunities to students enrolled in the Amity online MBA course, the university offers a dedicated career coach who guides students throughout their academic journey. The dedicated Amity Online placement cell conducts live virtual job fairs to help them build a successful career.

Meanwhile, Amity University Online provides resume-building, interview preparation, and profile-building services to the students. Among the 500+ active hiring partners of the Amity Online are:

  • Zomato
  • Bewakoof
  • OpexAI
  • Factspan
  • Happay
  • Sears Holdings

faqs.question: How is the learning experience in the Amity Online MBA in Data Science?
faqs.answer: As per the student's reviews, the Amity Online MBA in Data Science is up to the mark with the data visualization, strategic planning, regression modelling, and other learning outcomes of the program.

faqs.question: What kind of technical skills will I gain in the Amity Online MBA in Data Science?
faqs.answer: Statistical testing, diverse statistical tool proficiency, and other technical skills, along with expertise in MySQL, Hadoop, R, Python, and other tools, are included in the technical skills gained by a student enrolled in the Amity Online MBA in Data Science.

faqs.question: Can I work while pursuing the Amity Online MBA in Data Science?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Amity Online MBA in Data Science is specially designed to perfectly fit the busy schedule of working professionals and allow them to acquire a postgraduate degree without quitting their jobs.

faqs.question: Are there live sessions or interactions with faculty in the Amity Online MBA in Data Science?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Amity Online MBA in Data Science offers live classes with faculty interaction, allowing students to maintain a strong academic record.

reviews.item: My experience with amity online MBA was nothing less than a roller coaster ride for me as I was among the covid batch but the univeristy was very supportive and I enjoyed it.
Being a working professional enrolling in an online MBA is a challenge but amity online assisted me at every stage of my academic journey. Kudos to them.
The amity online mba faculty members are very friendly and helped in scoring good marks in a short span of time.
Everything is okay about amity university online but there are a few areas of improvement but everything seems nice to me. I recommend it to others too.
